div1.entryFree: Mart, vb. to traffic, to trade: if he shall think it fit, a saucy stranger in his court to m. as in a Romish stew, Cymb. I, 6, 151. trans. == to buy, or to sell: you have let him go and nothing --ed with him, Wint. IV, 4, 363. to sell and m. your offices for gold to undeservers, Caes. IV, 3, 11.
